steps.title: Use the parallel slope
steps.content: Line $k$ has equation $y=7x+2$, so its slope is $7$. A parallel line must have the same slope.

steps.title: Use the given point
steps.content: Line $j$ passes through $(0,3)$, so its $y$-intercept is $3$. With slope $7$, its equation is $y=7x+3$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graphing points $(0,3)$ and $(1,10)$ gives a line with slope $7$ and intercept $3$, which matches $y=7x+3$. The answer is A.
